info.title: Custom Views
info.description: To apply CRUD operations of customviews, to pin field and to sort fields of customviews

schema.description: Get all custom views of a module

allOf.description: Custom view item with required fields
Custom view info with required fields

401.description: Unauthorized access token or invalid token

details.description: Additional details about the permission error

schema.description: Get a specific custom view of a module using custom view ID

204.description: Given customview id is not found

custom_views.description: List of custom views to update sort order

Include.name: include_inner_details
Include.description: To include inner details of criteria and cross filters

more_records.description: indicates if more records are available

SharedTo.description: Information about users/groups the Custom View is shared with

subordinates.description: true if subordinates are included, false otherwise

CustomViewField.description: Fields included in the Custom View

_pin.description: Indicates if the field is pinned

_width.description: Width of the field in pixels

wrap_text.description: Indicates if the Custom View is wrapped

display_value.description: Display Value of the Custom View

$modified_criteria.description: Indicates if the criteria has been modified

access_type.description: Access Type of the Custom View

created_time.description: Creation Time of the Custom View

modified_time.description: Modification Time of the Custom View

last_accessed_time.description: Last Accessed Time of the Custom View

system_name.description: System Name of the Custom View

default.description: Indicates if the Custom View is set as default

system_defined.description: Indicates if the Custom View is system defined

locked.description: Indicates if the Custom View is locked

favorite.description: Indicates if the Custom View is marked as favorite

offline.description: Indicates if the Custom View is available offline

cross_filters.description: Cross Filters applied to the Custom View

include_objects.description: Indicates if related records are to be included

api_name.description: API name of the Child relationship module

id.description: Id of the Child relationship module

$disrupted.description: Display name of the related module

sort_by.description: Field used to sort the Custom View

sort_order.description: Sort order of the Custom View

code.description: Keywords that explain the operation result

json_path.description: Error path in the given request body

code.description: Short status code for the operation

InvalidDataSort.description: Invalid data error details for sort field or order

MandatoryNotFoundForSort.description: Mandatory field not found error details for sort field or order

code.description: Error code for mandatory field not found

InvalidDataSortById.description: Invalid data error details for sort field or order by ID

custom_views.description: Array of custom views with failure details

Array of custom views with success details

CustomViewUpdateSuccess.description: Response schema for successful custom view update operation.

RequiredParameterMissingResponse.description: Error responses for missing required parameters

code.description: Short status code for the operation

ResourcePathIndexError.description: Indicates that a specific segment of the resource path or URL is invalid.

resource_path_index.description: Index of the invalid segment in the resource path.

ModuleForbiddenErrorResponse.description: Response returned when the user does not have required permissions

details.description: Additional details about the permission error

permissions.description: List of permissions required to perform the action

SimpleFieldError.description: Error caused by an invalid or missing field.

api_name.description: API name of the field that caused the error.

json_path.description: JSON path pointing to the invalid field.

SimpleFilterCriterionValueNumber.description: Numeric value for number field options.

SimpleFilterCriterionValueBoolean.description: Boolean value for checkbox field options.

SimpleFilterCriterionValueObjectBase.description: Base minified record of the lookup module.

id.description: Represents the record id of the lookup module

name.description: Represents the name of the lookup module record

allOf.description: Base minified record of the lookup module.

SimpleFilterCriterionValueObjectRequest.description: Lookup object value for filter criteria

allOf.description: Base minified record of the lookup module.

SimpleFilterCriterionValueObjectResponse.description: Lookup object value for filter criteria

FilterFieldBase.description: Field reference for filter operations with minimal required properties

api_name.description: Field API name for filter application. Supports relationship notation (e.g., 'Deals__r.Stage')

SimpleFilterCriterionRequest.description: Simple field-based filter criterion with single field, comparator, and value

allOf.description: Field reference for filter operations with minimal required properties

field.description: Field to apply the filter on

comparator.description: Comparison operator. Note: allowed_groups.filters only supports 'in' for allowed_values context.

type.description: Indicates if the value is a direct value or a system variable placeholder

SimpleFilterCriterionResponse.description: Simple field-based filter criterion with single field, comparator, and value

allOf.description: Field reference for filter operations with minimal required properties

field.description: Field to apply the filter on

comparator.description: Comparison operator. Note: allowed_groups.filters only supports 'in' for allowed_values context.

type.description: Indicates if the value is a direct value or a system variable placeholder

$disrupted.description: Indicates whether the criterion is disrupted

GroupedFilterCriterionRequest.description: Grouped filter criterion containing multiple filter conditions with logical operators for complex filtering logic

group.description: Array of filter conditions to be grouped together with the specified logical operator

group_operator.description: Logical operator to apply between filter conditions in the group

GroupedFilterCriterionResponse.description: Grouped filter criterion containing multiple filter conditions with logical operators for complex filtering logic

$disrupted.description: Indicates if the group has been disrupted

group.description: Array of filter conditions to be grouped together with the specified logical operator

group_operator.description: Logical operator to apply between filter conditions in the group

FilterCriterionRequest.description: Filter criteria for data selection supporting both simple field-based filters and complex grouped filters with logical operators

FilterCriterionResponse.description: Filter criteria for data selection supporting both simple field-based filters and complex grouped filters with logical operators
